x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking the amount of liquid funds available in accounts.

Comment:
Example:
Monitoring the daily cash balance of a corporate current account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deposit Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking customer deposit balances, including savings, checking, and term deposits.

Comment:
Example: Total fixed deposits per branch or per customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan & Credit Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Monitoring outstanding loans, credit facilities, and repayment status.

Comment:
Example: Balance of a mortgage account or total credit exposure for a corporate borrower.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment & Securities Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking holdings in financial instruments like stocks, bonds, and derivatives.

Comment:
Example: Number of shares in a trading portfolio or market value of government bonds held.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Liability Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Monitoring amounts owed by the bank to other parties.

Comment:
Example: Interbank borrowings, issued bonds, or accrued interest payable.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Net Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Monitoring the difference between assets and liabilities in a specific category or overall.

Comment:
Example: Net cash position = total cash inflows − outflows; net FX exposure per currency.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Monitoring assets pledged or received as security for loans or trades.

Comment:
Example: Collateral pledged against a corporate loan or securities held as margin for derivatives.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Porfolio Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Monitoring positions across multiple accounts, assets, or instruments in aggregate.

Comment:
Example: Total investment portfolio value, or total loan exposure across all branches.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Derivative Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking positions in derivative instruments used for risk management or trading.

Comment:
Example: Open interest in FX forwards, interest rate swaps, or options contracts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Forecasted Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Estimating future positions based on expected transactions or market conditions.

Comment:
Example: Projected cash balances for the next week or expected loan growth.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Valuation-Based Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking positions using different valuation methods such as book, market, or mark-to-market.

Comment:
Example: Loan portfolio balance per ledger (book value) vs. trading securities at current market prices.
